basic_details.job_title: J&K Bank – Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor – 7 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Bank (J&K Bank) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor. Candidates with any Graduate Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through J&K Bank official website.

age_limit.age_details: Zonal Security Officer: Max 62 years. FL Counsellor: Max 65 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline for Zonal Security Officer. Graduate with experience in Banking/related fields and knowledge of Banking, Law, Finance, Agriculture for FL Counsellor.

salary_details.pay_scale: Zonal Security Officer: Rs. 45,000/- Per Month. FL Counsellor: Rs. 22,000/- Per Month.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of J&K Bank to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: J&K Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor Posts
